concerns.text: FR-007 mandates a 'one-sample t-test' against the baseline. Task T023 implements 'Bootstrap CI' instead. There is no task covering the mandatory t-test required by FR-007 and SC-002.

FR-004 defines Answer Correctness as 'Exact Match OR semantic similarity >= 0.85'. Tasks T008 and T022 implement an additional constraint: 'AND Ground Truth Answer present in retrieved context'. No task exists to implement the FR-004 definition without this extra constraint, creating a coverage gap for the spec's defined metric.

FR-006 requires embedding the baseline MLLM SAA scores as a fixed, immutable JSON reference. Task T007 loads a baseline but defines the schema as `{'baseline_saa': 0.0, 'source': 'paper_ref'}`. There is no explicit task to 'embed' the specific scalar value from the CiteVQA paper into the code/data layer as required by FR-006.

SC-003 requires measuring the 'failure rate due to Attribution Hallucination'. While T024 generates a plot of failure modes, there is no explicit task to calculate and report the specific 'failure rate' metric (count of hallucinations / total correct answers) required by SC-003.

US-3 requires the Visual-Only control to predict a bounding box or chunk ID. Task T029 mentions computing 'Visual Localization Accuracy (VLA)', but the spec defines the metric as SAA based on the predicted location. There is no task explicitly calculating SAA for the Visual-Only pipeline (US-3), only VLA.
